fields.title: Remove skill injection code and old skill files
fields.description:
Clean up skill-related code after agent refactor is complete.

## Remove
1. src/agent/skills.ts (LoadedSkill, loadSkill, loadSkills)
2. skills/ directory from extension (or repurpose for user-facing skills only)
3. Skill references from TaskType interface
4. Skill loading from TaskRegistry

## Keep (if needed for other purposes)
- User-facing skill loading for main agent (not workers)
- ~/.pi/agent/skills/ discovery for main agent context

## Verify
- npm run gate passes
- Agent spawning still works
- No dead code
fields.close_reason: Removed skills.ts, registry.ts, and TaskType/ResolvedPolicy types. All skill injection code cleaned up.
